mods.name: SalJam_Bench_Separation
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Manufacturer only has Dangerous Horizons craftables

mods.name: SalJam_Dangerous_Horizons_QOL
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Added additional Advanced versions of workshop scanner and extractor all with increases in stats. 2 new purchaseable workshop suits and backpacks. Increased output versions of oil pump, refiner and charging station. Added multiple exotic recipies in both chemistry bench and Eden trader. Added raptor talent and  recipe to create Uranium rods.

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Hauler
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 18 inventory slots, 3 heavy slots, but is slower by 10%

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Lightened
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 6 inventory slots, 1 heavy slot, is 20% quicker and uses less fuel with + 10k fuel tank

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Strengthened
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 12 inventory slots, 2 heavy slots, + 5k fuel tank and is 10% quicker

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Nuclear
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 12 inventory slots, 2 heavy slots and is much quicker & fuel efficient

mods.name: SalJam_SuperTeslaCoil
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: This adds a new Super Tesla Coil. Its bigger and more powerful, dealing 500 electric damage instead of 100. It has higher power requirements though.

mods.name: SalJam_Uranium_Collector_QOL
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Increases slots to 12 and extends the active radius from 2000 to 17500 units, so you can clean up the bodies.

mods.name: SalJam_Chargable_Devices_Advanced
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Adds advanced versions of all Lithium Tools, Laser tools and Battery Lights. The batteries are increased to 25K and 15K respectively. Also includes an Advanced Charging Device that increases power from 500 to 1500 for faster recharging.

mods.name: SalJam_Repair_Bench
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Adds a repair bench that only uses electricity for repairs, but repairing will take time. Tools and weapons can be repaired, including workshop. Includes an alteration bench for removing attachments in 1 second, as these cant be repaired

mods.name: SalJam_Workshop_Deployables
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Adds endgame WorkShop Deployables. An Exotic Scanner that has a 4x larger scan area, extractor thats twice as fast and has 18 slots. A solar panel that gives 20k power, a battery with 20M capacity and 20k flow rate. A heater and cooler that give a massive radius.
